name: Hub Group, Inc.
sic_description: Arrangement of  Transportation of  Freight & Cargo
summary: Hub Group, Inc. (HUBG) is a transportation and logistics company providing intermodal, trucking, and logistics services. The company operates as a surface transportation provider, offering freight solutions including intermodal transportation, managed transportation, final mile delivery, and freight brokerage services to shippers across North America.
